createWallet.title: Create or Connect Wallet
createWallet.subtitle: Generate a new Ethereum wallet or connect your existing MetaMask.
createWallet.passwordPrompt: Enter a password to encrypt your keystore
createWallet.warning: Save your recovery phrase and private key somewhere safe. They cannot be recovered if lost.
createWallet.metaMaskNotFound: MetaMask not detected. Please install the MetaMask browser extension.
createWallet.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
createWallet.phraseInstruction: Write down these 12 words in order and store them safely. They cannot be recovered if lost.
createWallet.phraseAcknowledge: I have written down my recovery phrase
createWallet.verifyInstruction: Enter the words at the positions shown to confirm you have saved your recovery phrase.
createWallet.wrongWords: One or more words are incorrect. Please check your recovery phrase.
createWallet.keystoreFileInstruction: Select the JSON keystore file you downloaded when creating your wallet.
createWallet.keystoreFileError: Invalid keystore file. Please select a valid JSON keystore.
createWallet.keystorePasswordInstruction: Enter the password you used when generating this keystore.

balance.title: Wallet Balance
balance.subtitle: Look up any wallet to check its SETH and ticket balance.
balance.invalidAddress: Please enter a valid Ethereum address.

buyTicket.title: Buy a Ticket
buyTicket.subtitle: Purchase one EventTicket (ETK) token for entry to the event.
buyTicket.soldOut: Sorry, this event is sold out.
buyTicket.incorrectAmount: Incorrect SETH amount. Please send exactly 0.01 SETH.
buyTicket.wrongNetwork: Please switch to the Sepolia testnet.

redeem.title: Redeem Ticket
redeem.subtitle: Present this page to the doorman to redeem your ticket for entry.
redeem.noTicketError: No ticket found in this wallet.
redeem.connectFirst: Please connect your wallet to redeem.

errors.unknownError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.contractNotDeployed: Contract not found at the configured address. Please deploy the contract and update VITE_CONTRACT_ADDRESS.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.hookOutsideProvider: useWallet must be used inside WalletProvider
errors.incorrectAmount: Incorrect SETH amount. Please send exactly 0.01 SETH.
errors.soldOut: Sorry, this event is sold out.
errors.noTicket: No ticket found in this wallet.
errors.insufficientFunds: Insufficient SETH balance. You need at least 0.01 SETH plus gas to buy a ticket.
errors.wrongNetwork: Please switch to the Sepolia testnet.
errors.connectedNoAddress: WalletStatus: connected but address is null
errors.notConnected: useConnectedWallet must be used in a connected state
